intro: Faroa involucrata, also known as the Faro plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments, including wound healing and respiratory issues.
